text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint little town, there lived a young girl named Lily. She loved to spin yarn and knit scarves for all sorts of animals. One sunny afternoon, while doodling in her knitting book, she came across a picture of a peculiar creature called a "Knitbat."

At first, Lily thought it was just a funny design someone drew in an old book. But then she remembered that no animal she knew could knit. Intrigued, she poked at the drawing. To her astonishment, it seemed to come alive! It floated there, eyes blinking.

Curious, Lily approached cautiously. The Knitbat hopped gently toward her, smiling sheepishly. "Greetings!" it chirped. "May I join your knitting circle?"

Her friends laughed, thinking it was just another joke. But after a few attempts to knit something tolerable, Lily knew she had a real companion on her hands—or paws?

Together, they knitted sweaters
